case_title: NG-LIM, LYZA VS BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NG-LIM, LYZA AS TO DEFENDANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO DON VIRGIL BRENNEMAN.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,220.00 FILED BY BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NG-LIM, LYZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO:FOLDER/TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED. TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 821966.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG-LIM, LYZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,285.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $4200. THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $6600 AND ATTRIBUTES TWO-THIRDS OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO DEFENDANT FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $4200.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BRENNEMAN, DON VIRGIL RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NG-LIM, LYZA $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00, JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT (CROSS-PLAINTIFF) IN THE AMOUNT OF $2200.00. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $6000.00 AND ATTRIBUTES ONE- THIRD OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO PLAINTIFF- (CROSS-DEFENDANT) LYZA NG-LIM FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $2200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
PLTF'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT TO COURT, RETURNED. NO SIGNATURE OF PLTF'S.
PLTF'S REQUEST PAYMENT TO COURT RETURNED. AMOUNT OF CHECK NOT ENOUGH FUNDS.
